title: Road Vehicle Registration, Iran, 1955/56 and 1960/61 (World Bank, 1962)
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank)
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION, not bulk download. Original document is a 1962 scanned World Bank report (data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1962_economic_development_program.pdf), Chapter 4 (Transport and Communications), Table 1, page 69 (printed page -66-). Every value was verified by rendering the exact page to a high-resolution PNG (pdftoppm -r 200) and reading the table directly off the image; pdftotext had garbled several digits (e.g. 'Buses ... 8,0 7' for 8,047; '2h' for 24; 'lb,999' for 14,999) which the image resolved unambiguously. No value was interpolated, estimated, or fabricated. Internal consistency check: each row's registered_1960_61 minus registered_1955_56 equals the printed 'increase' column exactly (e.g. Automobiles 92,992-33,666=59,326), confirming the transcription.
time_coverage: 1955/56 and 1960/61 (two-point comparison, not a continuous annual series)
frequency: biennial snapshot (start and end of the Second Seven-Year Plan)
units: number of registered vehicles; percentages as printed. See data.csv column headers.
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
notes: Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1962_economic_development_program.pdf — Chapter 4 (Transport and Communications), Table 1, page 69 (printed page -66-). Iranian solar calendar years (e.g. 1955/56 = 21 March 1955-20 March 1956). Part of a systematic effort to extract Pahlavi-era (esp. 1941-1962) data from primary-source PDFs already in data/raw/.
